zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Heaton於大約1323年出生在英國諾圖波藍德希頓時，他的父親Thomas de Heaton II36歲，母親Agnes de Heaton32歲。他於大約1350年與Joan Clifford在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德艾林加姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1369年10月22日在英國諾圖波藍德哈特雷享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Heaton于大约1323年出生在英国諾圖波藍德希頓时，他的父亲Thomas de Heaton II36岁，母亲Agnes de Heaton32岁。他于大约1350年与Joan Clifford在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德艾林加姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1369年10月22日在英国諾圖波藍德哈特雷享年47岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Heaton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from any of various places called with Old English hēah ‘high’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’: Heaton (Yorkshire, Northumberland); Heaton Norris, Heaton under Horwich, Heaton with Oxcliffe, Great Heaton, Little Heaton (all Lancashire); Capheaton, Kirkheaton (Northumberland); Cleckheaton, Hanging Heaton, Kirkheaton (Yorkshire). This surname was taken to Ireland in the mid 17th century, and within Ireland is now mainly found in Ulster.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Heaton was born about 1323, in Heaton, Northumberland, England, his father, Thomas de Heaton II, was 36 and his mother, Agnes de Heaton, was 32. He married Joan Clifford about 1350, in Ellingham, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 22 October 1369, in Hartley, Northumberland, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Heaton est né environ 1323, à Heaton, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Heaton II, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Heaton, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Joan Clifford environ 1350, à Ellingham, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 22 octobre 1369, à Hartley, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Heaton um 1323 in Heaton, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Heaton II 36 und seine Mutter Agnes de Heaton 32. Er hat um 1350 in Ellingham, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Joan Clifford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 22. Oktober 1369 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Hartley, Northumberland, England und wurde in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Heaton è nato il circa 1323 nel Heaton, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Thomas de Heaton II, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Heaton, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Joan Clifford circa 1350, nel Ellingham, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 22 ottobre 1369, nel Hartley, Northumberland, England, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Heatonが約1323年にイギリスノースウンバーランドヒートンで生まれた時，父Thomas de Heaton IIは36歳，母Agnes de Heatonは32歳であった。約1350年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドエリンガムでJoan Cliffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1369年10月22日にイギリスノースウンバーランドハートリーで47歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Heaton(이)가 대략 1323년 영국 노르스벌랜드 히턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Heaton II(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Heaton(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 엘링함에서 Joan Clifford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1369년 10월 22일 영국 노르스벌랜드 하틀리에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Heaton nasceu aproximadamente 1323, em Heaton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Heaton II, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Heaton, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Clifford aproximadamente 1350, em Ellingham, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 22 de outubro de 1369, em Hartley, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Heaton родился около 1323 г. в местности хитон, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Heaton II было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Heaton, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Clifford около 1350 г. в местности эллингхам, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 22 октября 1369 г. в местности хартли, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Heaton nació aproximadamente 1323, en Heaton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Heaton II, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Agnes de Heaton, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Joan Clifford aproximadamente 1350, en Ellingham, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 22 de octubre de 1369, en Hartley, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
